mainEntity.name: Compare AEO tools for LA vs. Chicago firms
mainEntity.text: Compare AEO tools for LA vs. Chicago firms

acceptedAnswer.text: Free: Google Search Console, Schema.org. Paid: Ahrefs ($99/mo), Clearscope ($170/mo)—similar for LA/Chicago, prioritize schema validators.[1]

suggestedAnswer.text: LA firms favor local tools; Chicago uses enterprise like SEMrush. All track AI impressions. Table comparison shows schema free across cities—invest in content first.[4]
